name: cloud-delegation
description: Linear-as-queue + cloud-agent (Codex, Cursor) delegation workflow — issue creation, polling, push-back-vs-fix matrix, agent env constraints, AGENTS.md auto-sync hook. v1.4: code-only PRs from cloud agents (ROADMAP/CHANGELOG/README owned by commit-review post-merge); plan-shaped Linear task spec template; Linear GH auto-transition workspace config; non-draft PR rule for auto-transition compatibility; ROADMAP-fallback flow for projects without Linear; Codex-Reviews-Cursor Tier-2 disabled.
